prestazioni: Engine swap to a **K24A2** (2.4L DOHC i-VTEC from the 2004-2008 Acura TSX) with a **Golden Eagle Racing K24A2 Stroker Kit** (87mm crank, 99mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam rods) for 2.6L displacement, paired with a **Garrett GT3076R turbocharger** (0.86 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** for 18 psi of boost. Supporting mods include a **PRL Motorsports K24A2 High Flow Intake Manifold**, **Skunk2 Pro Series 70mm throttle body**, and **Hondata KPro ECU** with a custom tune by **Church Automotive Testing** for 400+ WHP on E85.

Full **BC Racing BR Series Coilovers** (custom valved for the CF8/CF9 chassis) with **Swift Springs 8K/6K rates** and **SuperPro 8085K poly bushings** for the front control arms. Rear subframe reinforced with a **Hasport CF8/CF9 Rear Subframe Brace** and **Cusco 2-Point Strut Bar** to eliminate flex under hard cornering. Braking upgraded to **DBA 5000 Series rotors** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines**.

Drivetrain overhaul with a **PPG Stage 2 5-speed transmission** (forged internals, upgraded synchros) and **Competition Clutch Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch** with **ACT Prolite flywheel**. Limited-slip differential via **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2-way, 45% preload) and **Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch aluminum driveshaft** to handle increased torque. Final drive ratio changed to **4.92:1** for quicker acceleration.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Widebody Kit** (CF8/CF9-specific, 3-piece front bumper, overfenders, and rear diffuser) with **custom carbon fiber hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction) from **Seibon Carbon**. Side skirts replaced with **J's Racing CF8/CF9 Side Steps** and rear bumper modified to fit a **custom dual-exit 3.5-inch titanium exhaust** by **Burns Stainless**.

OEM+ aggressive stance with **Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels** (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Fender flares rolled and pulled for clearance, with **custom fender liners** from **Polystone** to prevent tire rub. Lowered 1.5 inches from stock ride height with **BC Racing coilovers** (aggressive spring rates).

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Sparco Pro ADV racing seat** (fixed-back, 6-point harness) and **Takata Drift III harness bar** (CF8/CF9-specific). Dashboard and door cards wrapped in **Alcantara suede** with **red stitching** by **Status Racing**, and **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede) paired with a **NRG Quick Release Hub**. Full **Defi BF Series gauges** (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod** by **Autometer**.
